title: Unsafe permissions on the DnsAdmins group
remediation:
1. Review the list of exposed entities to identify non-privileged accounts with risky permissions.
2. Take appropriate action on those accounts by removing the accounts from the DnsAdmins group. If some accounts require these permissions, grant them only the specific access needed.
To achieve the full score, remediate all exposed entities.
remediationImpact: This group can be delegated to non-AD administrators, like those managing networking functions such as DNS or DHCP, making these accounts attractive targets for compromise
